---
title: "Mohamed Bakr"
pagetitle: "Mohamed Bakr, CIA, CFE"
subtitle: "Data scientist, automation wizard, and Arabic calligrapher"
image: assets/images/index-illustration-transparent.png
image-alt: "Abstract illustration of Arabic calligraphy merging with data science concepts"

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - text: '{{< iconify fa7-brands:linkedin title="LinkedIn logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account" label="LinkedIn logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account" >}}'
      aria-label: "LinkedIn logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr/
      target: _blank
      rel: noopener noreferrer
    - text: '{{< iconify octicon:mark-github-16 title="GitHub logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account" label="GitHub logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account" >}}'
      aria-label: "GitHub logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account"
      href: https://github.com/Mohdbakr
      target: _blank
      rel: noopener noreferrer
    - text: '{{< iconify fa7-solid:envelope title="Contact logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account" label="Contact logo linking to Mohamed Bakr account" >}}'
      aria-label: "Contact logo linking to Mohamed Bakr contact page"
      href: /contact.html
    - text: '{{< iconify fa7-solid:heart title="Sponsor Mohamed Bakr" label="Sponsor Mohamed Bakr" >}}'
      aria-label: "Sponsor Mohamed Bakr"
      href: https://github.com/sponsors/Mohdbakr
      target: _blank
      rel: noopener noreferrer
page-layout: full
---

::: {#hero-heading}
Data and analytics have been at the core of my work across two decades in internal audit, FP&A, and risk management. A Master of Information and Data Science from UC Berkeley sharpened the formal foundations. I build ML systems and write about the probability and statistics that connect those domains.

[Learn more about me &rarr;](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
